criteria.budgetStrategy: Driving trip, off-site or value lodging, limited park days, and careful ticket selection. Disney resort packages are unlikely under this budget for six people unless there is an unusually strong promotion.
preferredResortTypes: Value resort if major promotion appears
mustHave: Works for a three-year-old, six-year-old, teenagers, and two adults
Total estimate close to 2000 to 3000 dollars
niceToHave: One character meal option if the budget survives

agent.summary: OpenAI agent failed, so local scoring was used. Error: 429 You exceeded your current quota, please check your plan and billing details. For more information on this error, read the docs: https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/error-codes/api-errors.
agent.bestMove: Review Drive + off-site hotel + 1 Disney park day. Current score: 87.
watchItems: Ticket promos that fit a short driving trip
Off-site hotels that sleep six and include breakfast

recommendations.title: Drive + off-site hotel + 1 Disney park day
recommendations.reason: Most realistic path to Disney inside the $2,000–$3,000 target. It keeps the magic, but limits park tickets.
recommendations.suggestedAction: Watch for hotel rooms under $150/night and ticket promos. Book only when the real total stays under $3,000.

recommendations.title: Drive + Good Neighbor hotel + 2 park days
recommendations.reason: Better Disney feel, but likely above budget unless a hotel or ticket discount appears.
recommendations.suggestedAction: Use as stretch target. Alert only if total drops near $3,000.

recommendations.title: Drive + Disney value resort promotion
recommendations.reason: Best experience, weakest budget fit. This only becomes interesting if Disney posts a major public offer.
recommendations.suggestedAction: Watch official Disney special offers. Do not book unless the full math changes.

recommendations.title: Fresh check: Walt Disney World Special Offers
recommendations.reason: Checked Walt Disney World Special Offers. Review snippets and prices before treating anything as bookable.
recommendations.suggestedAction: Open this source and verify whether the price signal applies to your dates and family size.
